title: Project Report: ERP Replacement Business Case — Business Analyst
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: Full business case: cost-benefit analysis, risk register, implementation roadmap, and executive presentation.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Advanced)*

**ERP Replacement Business Case** is a advanced-level end-to-end project for Business Analyst. Duration: 4–5 weeks. Full business case: cost-benefit analysis, risk register, implementation roadmap, and executive presentation. Tools: Excel, PowerPoint, BABOK.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Cost-benefit analysis (3-year TCO)
Objective: Risk register with mitigations
Objective: Phased implementation roadmap
Objective: Executive summary presentation
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Business Analyst portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Business Analyst resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Analysis
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Analysis** *(Level: Advanced)*

Current state costs. Complete these tasks: License; Maintenance; Labor. Deliverable for this phase: Cost baseline.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] License
- [ ] Maintenance
- [ ] Labor
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Analysis is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### When to use it
During week 1 of the project timeline.

### Where to use it
Business Analyst agile sprints and coursework milestones.

### Real use example
Team demo shows the Cost baseline to the teacher.

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Advanced)*

Submit all final deliverables: Business case document; Risk register; Roadmap; Executive deck. Skills demonstrated: Business case, ROI, Project planning. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Business case document
Deliverable: Risk register
Deliverable: Roadmap
Deliverable: Executive deck
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Business case document and passes the rubric.
key_takeaways: Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.
